metadata.name: Notify Customers of Critical Peak Pricing Event

description: Due to extreme heat and high demand, the utility is calling a Critical Peak Pricing (CPP) event for the next day, where electricity prices will be much higher for a few hours.

nodes.task_description: Identify all customers enrolled in the CPP rate plan.

expected_outcome.expected: System generates a list of all CPP customers.

nodes.task_description: Send a day-ahead notification to these customers via their preferred method (email, text, phone call) about the event timing and prices.

expected_outcome.expected: System successfully sends the CPP event notifications.

nodes.task_description: Include tips on how to reduce energy use during the event to save money.

expected_outcome.expected: The notification includes actionable conservation advice.
